summary: The available literature does not provide specific information about how the omnipresent nature of workplace allergens affects the long-term outcome of occupational allergic contact dermatitis over a two-year period. Thus, no definitive conclusion can be drawn regarding prognostic dependence on allergen exposure frequency.
